title: Home education - Ministry of Education
content:
Te whakaako ki te kāinga
Home education, also called homeschooling, can be an alternative to attending school. You must apply to exempt your child from school first.
- Te whakaako ki te kāinga Home education Home education, also known as homeschooling, can be an alternative to attending school in New Zealand. You'll need to apply for an exemption from attending school first.
